title: Makhlouf
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Makhlouf''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] that saw service in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]]. When the decision was made to construct a Rebel [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] in [[Airam (group)|Airam]] space. Makhlouf was among the ships that were part of a convoy that was sent there, although the cargo contents were not specified.

Unfortunately, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] learned of the convoy and readied a [[Battle of Rocrin|trap]] for it in the [[Rocrin system/Legends|Rocrin system]]. Constrained by the gravity well projectors of the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]'', and pinned down by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']], ''Makhlouf'' attempted to stop the attack by targeting the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. However, the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] was destroyed along with the entire convoy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
